base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their forties, of Latin American descent, with straight blonde hair and deep dark eyes, a soft smile. soft daylight from a north-facing window. a textured beige wall. lookalikes.prompt: A 30s man of mixed European descent, sitting on a wooden bench, reading a paperback book in late afternoon light. He has an oblong face with a slightly softer jawline, medium-length wavy blonde hair styled with a side part, a slightly broader nose with a more pronounced bridge, deep blue downturned eyes, and fuller lips. He has a neatly trimmed beard and mustache. Full-body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A full-body shot of a man in his late 30s sitting on a wooden bench, reading a paperback book in late afternoon light. His skin is medium-toned with a healthy glow. He possesses a strong, square jawline and a prominent, slightly aquiline nose. His eyes are deep-set and round, a warm hazel color, beneath thick, straight eyebrows. His lips are thin and subtly downturned. His short, dark brown hair is neatly swept back from a high forehead, with no signs of recession. He has a clean-shaven face. He is looking down at his book, a gentle, contemplative expression on his face. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
